name: Euclidean Circles V2
description: Six-channel Euclidean rhythm generator with three concentric LED rings. 16-step patterns per channel with length, fill, rotation, chaining, prescaling, step-edit, and 16 presets. Open-source firmware, 5V-only, WAV-file update.

controls.name: Top Encoder
controls.description: Cycles channel 1 (or 4) parameter: length → fill → start. Long press toggles between banks 1-3 and 4-6. In SETTINGS mode selects/saves presets.
controls.detail: Press: cycle param · Long press: switch bank · Rotate: adjust current param

controls.name: Middle Encoder
controls.description: Cycles channel 2 (or 5) parameter: length → fill → start. Long press enters AUTO CLOCK. In SETTINGS mode toggles numbered settings on/off.
controls.detail: Long press → AUTO CLOCK · rotate CW: 10–2500 bpm · fully CCW: stop internal clock

controls.name: Bottom Encoder
controls.description: Cycles channel 3 (or 6) parameter: length → fill → start. Long press enters PRESETS and SETTINGS mode. In SETTINGS adjusts LED brightness.
controls.detail: Long press → SETTINGS · rotate in SETTINGS: 8-step LED brightness

controls.name: F-BUTTON
controls.description: User-assignable performance button. Default = toggle bank 1-3/4-6. Assignable to 11 functions in F-BUTTON settings page.
controls.detail: SWITCH · RESET · MUTE · RUN/STOP · PICK PRESET · SHOW PRESETS · TOGGLE · SAVE & TOGGLE · FREEZE · FILL · ROTATE

controls.name: Six LED Rings
controls.description: Three concentric circles of 16 LEDs show length/fill/start for the active channel bank; innermost uses color to indicate which parameter the encoder currently edits.
controls.detail: BLUE/CYAN = length · ORANGE = fill · PURPLE/RED = start · green = current preset

inputs.name: CLK
inputs.description: External clock input. Rising edge advances all active channels one step. Doubles as data input for WAV-file firmware updates.

inputs.name: RST
inputs.description: Reset input. Rising edge resets all channels to step 1 on the next clock (edge-triggered by default; level-triggered in SETTINGS 15).

outputs.name: OUT 1
outputs.description: Trigger output for channel 1. Fires on each fill step of the channel 1 Euclidean (or STEP EDIT) pattern.
outputs.voltage: 5V pulse · 10 ms default or 1 ms (PULSE WIDTH setting)

outputs.name: OUT 4
outputs.description: Trigger output for channel 4. In default mode emits the offbeats of channel 1; in 6-CHANNEL mode becomes fully independent.

outputs.name: OUT 5
outputs.description: Trigger output for channel 5. Offbeats of channel 2 unless 6-CHANNEL is on.

outputs.name: OUT 6
outputs.description: Trigger output for channel 6. Offbeats of channel 3 unless 6-CHANNEL is on.

behaviors.name: 3+3 offbeat mode vs 6-CHANNEL
behaviors.description: Default: channels 4-6 emit the offbeats (inverse pattern) of channels 1-3, giving a locked call-and-response groove from three encoders. Enabling 6-CHANNEL makes 4-6 fully independent (second bank reached via F-BUTTON or long-press top encoder).

behaviors.name: SPLIT MODE
behaviors.description: Hybrid: channels 1-3 accept PRESCALE, CHAIN, STEP EDIT, and RANDOM while channels 4-6 stay pure Euclidean. Useful when melodic voicings need clean Euclidean gating while drums use chains or probability.

behaviors.name: CHAIN 12 / CHAIN 123
behaviors.description: Channel 1 plays once, then channel 2 (then optionally channel 3), concatenated onto OUT 1. Total length up to 48 steps. Chained channels stop emitting on their own jacks.

behaviors.name: PRESCALE 12 / 123
behaviors.description: Channel 2 advances one step per fill on channel 1 (and channel 3 per fill on channel 2 in 123). Produces polyrhythmic nesting where downstream channels tick only on parent hits rather than raw clock edges.

behaviors.name: TOGGLE (LOCK MODE)
behaviors.trigger: SETTINGS 2 toggle · long press = LOCK MODE
behaviors.description: Outputs flip state on each pulse instead of emitting triggers, turning OUT into a divided square wave usable as gate or clock. Long-press variant locks encoders to fill-only for jam safety.

behaviors.name: STEP EDIT mode
behaviors.description: Replaces the Euclidean engine on a channel pair with a hand-drawn 16-step sequence edited by rotating and pressing the encoder. Length inherits from Euclidean setting. Euclidean and Step-Edit patterns coexist in the preset.

behaviors.name: RANDOM mute
behaviors.description: Applies 25% probability of muting any given step across all channels. Produces looser, evolving patterns without altering the underlying rhythm.

behaviors.name: AUTO CLOCK
behaviors.description: Internal clock 10-2500 bpm replaces external CLK. F-BUTTON taps tempo. Rotating middle encoder fully CCW stops the clock. Persists until middle encoder is pressed again.

behaviors.name: SWAP ENCODERS
behaviors.description: Swaps top and bottom encoder roles so bank toggling lives on the bottom encoder and SETTINGS entry moves to the top. Muscle-memory fix for players who rest their thumb on the bottom of the panel.

behaviors.name: F-BUTTON FILL / FREEZE / ROTATE
behaviors.description: FILL adds extra hits while held; FREEZE snapshots current patterns so any encoder edits revert on release; ROTATE maps encoder turns to pattern rotation. Enables live pattern deviation without losing the stored rhythm.

behaviors.name: Preset auto-save
behaviors.description: Current rhythm is stored to flash automatically at power-off and reloaded on boot. 16 user preset slots saved via long-press on the top encoder inside SETTINGS.

behaviors.name: Level-triggered reset
behaviors.description: Reset input changes from edge- to level-triggered: channels halt on step 1 as long as RST is high. Useful for fills, drops, and gating the sequencer with a mute-like sustained gate.

behaviors.name: WAV-file firmware update
behaviors.description: Boots into updater expecting 2Vpp audio on CLK. Playing a signed WAV from any soundcard overwrites firmware. Open-source project — new features ship as WAV updates.

patchIdeas.name: Classic 3+3 offbeat kit
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 1 OFF · encoders 1-3 set kick/snare/hat Euclidean patterns · OUT 1-3 drive kick/snare/hat · OUT 4-6 automatically play the offbeats into ghost-snare, shaker, rim
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* 6-CHANNEL: OFF (3+3 offbeat mode)
* CH1: L=16 F=4 S=0 (kick)
* CH2: L=16 F=7 S=2 (snare)
* CH3: L=16 F=11 S=0 (hat)

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 4) t> Ghost Snare (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 5) t> Shaker (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 6) t> Rim (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythm nest (PRESCALE 123)
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 4 ON · channel 1 sparse (3/16) · channel 2 prescales off channel 1 hits · channel 3 prescales off channel 2 hits · produces generative polyrhythmic melodic counterpoint · OUT 1-3 to three voices
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* PRESCALE 123: ON
* CH1: L=16 F=3 · CH2: L=8 F=5 · CH3: L=5 F=2

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Bass Envelope (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Lead Envelope (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) t> Pad Envelope (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: 48-step megaloop (CHAIN 123)
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 6 ON · program three 16-step rhythms on channels 1/2/3 · OUT 1 emits concatenated 48-step pattern · channels 4-6 continue normally as counterpoint · F-BUTTON = TOGGLE for A/B variation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* CHAIN 123: ON
* F-BUTTON: TOGGLE presets
* CH1/2/3: three distinct 16-step patterns

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig) // 48-step megaloop
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 4) t> Hat (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 5) t> Clap (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 6) t> Perc (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Toggled square-wave LFO array
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 2 ON (TOGGLE) · each OUT flips on each hit · resulting slow square waves drive VCA and filter CV · Euclidean lengths/fills tune the sub-rhythmic modulation rate per destination
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* TOGGLE: ON (square-wave mode)
* CH1: L=16 F=1 (slowest) · CH2: L=16 F=3 · CH3: L=8 F=3

Clock:
VCA:
Filter:
VCO:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) >> VCA (CV)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) >> VCO (FM In)

patchIdeas.name: Step-Edit breakbeat + Euclidean hats
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 11 ON (STEP EDIT 1) · hand-draw a 16-step breakbeat kick on channel 1 · leave channels 2-3 as Euclidean for snare and hat · F-BUTTON = FREEZE for live fills that snap back
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* STEP EDIT 1: ON (CH1 hand-drawn kick)
* F-BUTTON: FREEZE
* CH2: L=16 F=4 (snare) · CH3: L=16 F=11 (hat)

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 4) t> Ghost (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Probabilistic evolving groove
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 14 ON (RANDOM 25% mute) · dense Euclidean patterns (fill > half length) · 25% step drop keeps groove loose · pair with F-BUTTON = SAVE & TOGGLE to auto-capture favorite variations across preset slots
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* RANDOM: ON (25% step mute)
* F-BUTTON: SAVE & TOGGLE
* CH1-3: dense fills (>50%)

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Drum 1 (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Drum 2 (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) t> Drum 3 (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 4) t> Drum 4 (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Standalone with AUTO CLOCK
patchIdeas.patch: No external clock · long press middle encoder · rotate to ~120 bpm (or F-BUTTON tap) · six channels drive full drum kit and one gate-to-envelope voice · RST input still accepts external resets from other performers
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* AUTO CLOCK: 120 bpm (middle encoder)
* F-BUTTON: tap tempo

Reset Source:

- Reset Source (Gate) t> Euclidean Circles V2 (RST) // song reset
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 4) t> Clap (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 5) t> Bass Envelope (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 6) t> Perc (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Level-triggered drop-out
patchIdeas.patch: SETTINGS 15 ON (level-triggered reset) · sustain a gate on RST during a breakdown · all channels halt on step 1 · release gate to restart in sync · use a performance gate or envelope sustain for musical drops
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* RESET MODE: level-triggered

Clock:
Performance Gate:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Performance Gate (Out) g> Euclidean Circles V2 (RST) // held = halt
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 3) t> Hat (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Split-mode drums + pure hat cluster
patchIdeas.patch: Long-press SETTINGS 1 → SPLIT MODE · CH1-3 with CHAIN 12 and STEP EDIT for flexible kick/snare · CH4-6 stay pure Euclidean hat/shaker/ride triplets · F-BUTTON = ROTATE for live cymbal phase shifts
patchIdeas.diagram:
Euclidean Circles V2:
* SPLIT MODE: ON (CH1-3 edited, CH4-6 pure Euclidean)
* CHAIN 12: ON · STEP EDIT 1: ON
* F-BUTTON: ROTATE
* CH4/5/6: triplet-feel Euclidean (e.g. 12/16, 7/16, 5/12)

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Euclidean Circles V2 (CLK)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 4) t> Hat (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 5) t> Shaker (Trig)
- Euclidean Circles V2 (OUT 6) t> Ride (Trig)
